description: The FeedClampedValueFieldInterface component is used as a template type item in data feed mappers in the Data Feeds system. This component allows for making a UI Template for changing a value with a minimum and maximum value.

fields.Value: The field that represents the data that should be read from and written to the source data feed.
fields.Formatting: The field to fill with data on how to format the value for displaying it.
fields.Min: The value Field to fill with the minimum value this feed number can be.
fields.Max: The value field to fill with the maximum value this feed number can be.
